tft_init.tooltip: Initialize the TFT screen and customize the pin configuration: CS (chip select), DC (data/command), MOSI (data), SCLK (clock), RST (reset, -1 means not used), BLK (backlight control, -1 means not used), and screen size
tft_init.message1: Pin Configuration CS %1 DC %2 MOSI %3 SCLK %4 RST %5 BLK %6

tft_set_rotation.tooltip: Set the rotation angle of the TFT screen, supporting four directions: 0 degrees, 90 degrees, 180 degrees, and 270 degrees

tft_invert_display.tooltip: Turn on or off the inverse color display mode of the TFT screen

tft_fill_screen.tooltip: Fill the entire TFT screen with the specified color

tft_clear_screen.tooltip: Clear the screen display content, which is equivalent to filling the entire screen with black

tft_preset_color.tooltip: Preset color picker with commonly used color options

tft_set_text_color.tooltip: Set text color and background color, background color is optional

tft_set_text_size.tooltip: Set the size of text displayed on the TFT screen. The larger the value, the larger the text.

tft_print.tooltip: Print text at specified column and row positions on the TFT screen

tft_draw_pixel.tooltip: Draw a point at the specified coordinates (X, Y) on the TFT screen

tft_draw_line.message0: Draw lines Start X: %1 Y: %2 End X: %3 Y: %4 Color %5
tft_draw_line.tooltip: Draw a straight line from the starting point (X0, Y0) to the end point (X1, Y1) on the TFT screen

tft_draw_fast_h_line.message0: Draw horizontal fast lines Start X: %1 Y: %2 Length: %3 Color %4
tft_draw_fast_h_line.tooltip: Draw a horizontal line of length W starting from (X,Y) on the TFT screen

tft_draw_fast_v_line.message0: Draw vertical lines Starting point X: %1 Y: %2 Length: %3 Color %4

tft_draw_rect.message0: Draw a rectangle Top left corner X: %1 Y: %2 Width: %3 Height: %4 Color %5

tft_fill_rect.message0: Fill the rectangle Top left corner X: %1 Y: %2 Width: %3 Height: %4 Color %5

tft_draw_round_rect.message0: Draw a rounded rectangle X: %1 Y: %2 Width: %3 Height: %4 Rounded: %5 Color %6
tft_draw_round_rect.tooltip: Draw a hollow rounded rectangle on the TFT screen. The coordinates of the upper left corner are (X, Y), the width is W, the height is H, and the fillet radius is R.

tft_fill_round_rect.message0: Fill the rounded rectangle X: %1 Y: %2 Width: %3 Height: %4 Rounded: %5 Color %6
tft_fill_round_rect.tooltip: Draw a solid rounded rectangle on the TFT screen. The coordinates of the upper left corner are (X, Y), the width is W, the height is H, and the fillet radius is R.

tft_draw_circle.message0: Draw a circle Center X: %1 Y: %2 Radius: %3 Color %4
tft_draw_circle.tooltip: Draw a hollow circle on the TFT screen, with the center coordinates (X, Y) and the radius R

tft_fill_circle.message0: Filled circle Center X: %1 Y: %2 Radius: %3 Color %4
tft_fill_circle.tooltip: Draw a solid circle on the TFT screen, with the center coordinates (X, Y) and the radius R

tft_draw_triangle.message0: Draw a triangle Point 1 X: %1 Y: %2 Point 2 X: %3 Y: %4 Point 3 X: %5 Y: %6 Color %7

tft_fill_triangle.message0: Fill the triangle Point 1 X: %1 Y: %2 Point 2 X: %3 Y: %4 Point 3 X: %5 Y: %6 Color %7

tft_color565.tooltip: Convert RGB colors to 16-bit color values

tft_create_canvas16.tooltip: Create a 16-bit color canvas object for off-screen drawing and image processing

tft_get_buffer.tooltip: Get the buffer pointer of the canvas for direct access to canvas data

tft_bitmap_image.tooltip: Create an image data that can be displayed on the TFT screen (leave blank to use the default image)

tft_image_file.message0: Click to select the image file %1
tft_image_file.tooltip: Click to select the image file, support preview and size adjustment, and display it at the specified position on the TFT screen

tft_draw_image.message0: Display image %3 at location X: %1 Y: %2

tft_draw_url_image.message0: Download the URL image and display %1 Image URL %2 %3 X coordinate %4 Y coordinate %5 %6 Maximum width %7 Maximum height %8
tft_draw_url_image.tooltip: Download JPEG images from URL and display them on the TFT screen, automatically scaling to fit the specified size. Requires WiFi connection and TJpg_Decoder library
